title: Why Choose National Dental?
content: At National Dental, we prioritize patient comfort and satisfaction. Our team of skilled dentists and modern technology ensure a precise and comfortable experience. We accept most insurances and offer flexible payment options to make high-quality dentistry accessible to all.

title: Our Mission
content: Our mission is to provide exceptional care and create a positive environment for our patients. We strive to improve our patients' confidence and overall well-being while serving families across Manhattan, Brooklyn, The Bronx, Queens, and Long Island.

title: Our Team
content: Meet our team of acclaimed dentists in New York, dedicated to providing exceptional care to all our patients. Our team includes Dr. Nitin Doshi, Dr. Vahid Ipektchi, Dr. Tiffany Konklewski, and many more.

title: Advanced Dental Technology
content: National Dental delivers complete care in one place, from routine visits to advanced implant and cosmetic treatment. With skilled dentists, modern technology, and flexible payment options, we make high-quality dentistry accessible and comfortable across NYC and Long Island.

title: Payment Options
content: Join our Membership Club to get comprehensive dental coverage and enjoy exclusive benefits. We also offer flexible payment options to make high-quality dentistry accessible to all.

title: Our Locations
content: Find a convenient location near you across Brooklyn, Queens, Nassau, and Suffolk. Our NYC dental offices are equipped to diagnose and treat the full range of dental issues.

title: Our Philosophy
content: At National Dental, we believe that a great dental visit goes beyond healthy teeth. Our goal is to provide exceptional care and create a positive environment for our patients.

title: 11 Reasons to Rethink Dentures and Look into Dental Implants
content: Dental implants are a reliable and durable solution for tooth loss. They can improve your comfort, speech, and confidence, and are more convenient than traditional dentures. With a success rate of 95-99%, dental implants are a worthwhile investment in your oral health.

title: Smile Makeover Trends in New York City
content: New smile makeover trends in New York City focus on creating natural-looking results that match your personality. Digital Smile Design uses AI and 3D printing to create personalized treatment plans.

title: How Cosmetic Dentistry Differs from General Dentistry
content: General dentistry focuses on oral health and function, while cosmetic dentistry improves the visual appearance of your smile. Both types of dentists work together to provide comprehensive care.

title: What to Expect During the All-on-4 Dental Implant Procedure
content: The All-on-4 procedure uses four implants to support a complete set of upper or lower teeth. Many patients receive a temporary set of fixed teeth on the same day as their procedure.

title: New Smile Makeover Trends in New York City
content: New smile makeover trends in New York City aim for natural results, focusing on matching your personality, not just creating an artificial look. Digital Smile Design uses AI and advanced technology to create personalized treatment plans.

title: Why Is Using Your Tax Refund for Dental Care a Smart Investment?
content: Preventive dental care can save you $50 for every $1 spent today. A tax refund can cover out-of-pocket costs that insurance doesn't pay for, and untreated dental issues can lead to $1,000s in future expenses.

title: What Are the Latest Dental Implant Trends and Technology Advances?
content: Implant technology is more precise and minimally invasive than ever before. Digital planning tools improve accuracy and long-term success rates, and healing times are shorter thanks to improved materials and surgical techniques.

title: What Are the Best Dental Health Tips for Children?
content: Building strong dental habits early supports lifelong oral health. Regular visits to a pediatric dentist help prevent common dental issues, and daily routines at home are just as important as professional care.

title: How Do You Prepare for Your First Orthodontic Appointment?
content: Your first orthodontic visit is mainly an evaluation, not a commitment to treatment. Preparing questions and dental records helps your orthodontist create a clear plan, and X-rays, bite checks, and other diagnostic tools are used to determine the best course of treatment.

title: What Are Porcelain Veneers and How Do They Transform Your Smile?
content: Porcelain veneers are thin shells bonded to the front surface of teeth to improve their appearance. They can correct tooth gaps, yellowing, and misalignment in one procedure. Porcelain is stronger and more stain-resistant than composite resin, making it the preferred choice for most patients.

title: How to Maintain Your Porcelain Veneers
content: Maintaining porcelain veneers is straightforward and mostly comes down to good habits. Keep up with your oral hygiene routine, be mindful of what you eat and drink, and maintain healthy daily habits. This will help your veneers last for decades.

title: Frequently Asked Questions
content: Q: How long do porcelain veneers last? A: With proper care, porcelain veneers can last 10 to 20 years or longer. Q: Do veneers hurt to get? A: The procedure involves removing a small amount of enamel from the tooth surface before the veneer is bonded. Local anesthetic is used so you won't feel anything during the procedure.
